ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., WR, RB, QB) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "player_dob" TEXT /* Player's date of birth */,
  "player_height" TEXT /* Player's height */,
  "player_weight" INTEGER /* Player's weight in pounds */,
  "player_college" TEXT /* Player's college (if applicable) */,
  "player_draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "player_draft_round" INTEGER /* Round in which the player was drafted */,
  "player_draft_pick" INTEGER /* Draft pick number */,
  "player_status" TEXT /* Current status of the player (e.g., active, retired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_position FOREIGN KEY ("position") REFERENCES positions ("position_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the team belongs to (e.g., NFL, NCAA) */,
  "team_city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "team_stadium" TEXT /* Name of the team's home stadium */,
  "team_coach" TEXT /* Name of the team's head coach */,
  "team_founded" TEXT /* Year the team was founded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_league FOREIGN KEY ("league") REFERENCES leagues ("league_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "team1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first team */,
  "team2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second team */,
  "score1" INTEGER /* Score of the first team */,
  "score2" INTEGER /* Score of the second team */,
  "game_location" TEXT /* Location of the game (e.g., home, away, neutral) */,
  "game_stadium" TEXT /* Name of the stadium where the game was played */,
  "game_weather" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  "game_attendance" INTEGER /* Number of attendees at the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_game_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player-game statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "receptions" INTEGER /* Number of receptions */,
  "receiving_yards" INTEGER /* Total receiving yards */,
  "longest_reception" INTEGER /* Longest reception */,
  "receiving_touchdowns" INTEGER /* Number of receiving touchdowns */,
  "fantasy_points" REAL /* Fantasy points earned */,
  "rushing_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of rushing attempts */,
  "rushing_yards" INTEGER /* Total rushing yards */,
  "rushing_touchdowns" INTEGER /* Number of rushing touchdowns */,
  "passing_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of passing attempts */,
  "passing_completions" INTEGER /* Number of passing completions */,
  "passing_yards" INTEGER /* Total passing yards */,
  "passing_touchdowns" INTEGER /* Number of passing touchdowns */,
  "interceptions_thrown" INTEGER /* Number of interceptions thrown */,
  "fumbles" INTEGER /* Number of fumbles */,
  "fumbles_lost" INTEGER /* Number of fumbles lost */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_season_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player-season statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Season year */,
  "total_receptions" INTEGER /* Total number of receptions */,
  "total_receiving_yards" INTEGER /* Total receiving yards */,
  "total_receiving_touchdowns" INTEGER /* Total number of receiving touchdowns */,
  "total_fantasy_points" REAL /* Total fantasy points earned */,
  "total_rushing_attempts" INTEGER /* Total rushing attempts */,
  "total_rushing_yards" INTEGER /* Total rushing yards */,
  "total_rushing_touchdowns" INTEGER /* Total rushing touchdowns */,
  "total_passing_attempts" INTEGER /* Total passing attempts */,
  "total_passing_completions" INTEGER /* Total passing completions */,
  "total_passing_yards" INTEGER /* Total passing yards */,
  "total_passing_touchdowns" INTEGER /* Total passing touchdowns */,
  "total_interceptions_thrown" INTEGER /* Total interceptions thrown */,
  "total_fumbles" INTEGER /* Total fumbles */,
  "total_fumbles_lost" INTEGER /* Total fumbles lost */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_season_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_season_stats_season FOREIGN KEY ("season") REFERENCES seasons ("season_year")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_year" INTEGER /* Year of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "season_type" TEXT /* Type of season (e.g., regular, playoffs) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "league_founded" TEXT /* Year the league was founded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the position */,
  "position_description" TEXT /* Description of the position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_players" (
  "user_player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-player combination */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "acquisition_date" TEXT /* Date the user acquired the player */,
  "acquisition_method" TEXT /* Method of acquisition (e.g., draft, trade, free agency) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_players_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
column_names: Position of the player (e.g., WR, RB, QB)
ID of the team the player belongs to
Round in which the player was drafted
Current status of the player (e.g., active, retired)
League the team belongs to (e.g., NFL, NCAA)
City where the team is based
Name of the team's home stadium
Name of the team's head coach
Location of the game (e.g., home, away, neutral)
Name of the stadium where the game was played
Number of attendees at the game
Unique identifier for each player-game statistic
Unique identifier for each player-season statistic
Unique identifier for each user-player combination
Date the user acquired the player
Method of acquisition (e.g., draft, trade, free agency)
